title: Senior Originator, EAM and Family Office Network
summary: Over 20 years across investment banking, financial markets and client coverage, with an extensive network of UHNW families, family offices and conglomerates across Russia and the wider CIS. Co-founded an EAM business that reached over USD 90m AUM within 24 months. Strong track record building structured finance and derivatives desks from scratch at major banking groups, with deal sizes regularly exceeding USD 100m. Now focused on originator roles within private banking, leveraging an established client network and broad cross-asset product expertise.
highlights: Co-founded EAM, AUM USD 90m+ within 24 months
Grew team client revenue to USD 175m p.a. at major banking group
Deals with Forbes-ranked family offices, ticket sizes up to USD 2bn
availability: Open to relocation: Singapore, Hong Kong, GCC, EU, Switzerland

title: Senior Commercial Executive, Wealth Distribution
summary: 25+ years across wealth management and private banking distribution within Italy's leading banking groups, including senior commercial roles with full P&L accountability and multi-billion euro AUM responsibility. Built a regulated financial advisor network from the ground up within a major postal banking group, and led large-scale sales organisations spanning thousands of staff and billions in assets. Strong track record of structuring strategic partnerships at C-suite level and supporting institutional placements and IPO narratives. Registered financial advisor in Italy, targeting senior roles in Switzerland.
highlights: Built regulated advisor network (120 advisors) from scratch
Managed sales organisations covering EUR 40bn+ AUM
C-suite partnership origination across major Italian banking groups
availability: Available for senior roles, preferred location Lugano

title: Head of Operations, Private Markets
summary: 8+ years in financial services combining Big 4 audit experience with end-to-end operational ownership at a boutique asset manager. Hands-on across fund operations, regulatory compliance and investor reporting for multi-jurisdictional fund structures spanning Switzerland, Luxembourg and Belgium. Track record of identifying recoverable banking fee discrepancies and delivering significant audit fee reductions through competitive RFP processes. ACCA qualified, fluent in French, Turkish and English.
highlights: Manages fund operations across CH, LU and BE (FINMA, CSSF, FSMA)
Delivered c.40% reduction in audit fees via RFP and renegotiation
Big 4 background: Deloitte Luxembourg and PwC Zurich

title: Executive Director, CFO and Head of Strategy
summary: Executive Committee member at a major Geneva private banking group, serving as CFO and Head of Strategy for a trading and sales division with a CHF 55m+ annual budget and an 8-person team, while also heading the CEO's Office. Delivered over CHF 1m in recurring annual savings and launched more than 10 strategic revenue initiatives over three years. Background spans FP&A, cross-divisional strategy projects, and digital and data architecture for business steering. Entrepreneurial profile with founder experience in fintech and AI health-tech ventures.
highlights: Full ownership of CHF 55m+ annual budget, division ExCo member
CHF 1m+ in recurring annual savings delivered
10+ strategic revenue initiatives launched in three years

title: Senior Investment Executive, UHNW and Family Offices
summary: 20+ years of investment, wealth management and advisory experience across major Nordic and Swiss private banking platforms, with a recent independent advisory venture in Dubai. Has managed and advised client assets exceeding USD 1bn, with senior advisory relationships above USD 50m per client. Strong background evaluating private investment opportunities and raising capital for growth-stage companies, alongside traditional multi-asset portfolio advisory. Based in Dubai with immediate availability and long-term GCC commitment.
highlights: Advised UHNW relationships above USD 50m per client
Managed client assets exceeding USD 1bn
Evaluated 50+ private deals, raised capital for 10+ companies

title: Institutional Sales Specialist, Asset Management
summary: Institutional sales specialist at a major German asset manager, managing and expanding relationships with institutional clients including corporations, insurance companies, pension funds and NPOs. Acts as a key liaison coordinating senior client visits between firm leadership and major Chinese institutional clients. Earlier experience spans strategy consulting on a global wealth report and wealth management internships at two bulge-bracket private banks. Native Chinese and German speaker, fluent in English.
highlights: Manages institutional client relationships incl. China desk coordination
Contributed to Global Wealth Report market sizing at strategy consultancy
Native Chinese/German, fluent English; CESGA certified

title: Senior Independent Wealth Advisor, Cross-Border
summary: 25+ years in discretionary and advisory portfolio management for HNW clients across Europe, with a strong specialisation in cross-border wealth planning for French expatriates in Switzerland and Italy. Currently runs an LSFin and ARIF registered advisory firm in Lugano. Background spans independent portfolio management in Geneva, asset management licensing projects in Italy, and a US-regulated commodity trading advisory. Deep expertise in global asset allocation, structured products and life-insurance based wealth solutions, with regulatory fluency across LSFin/FinSA, MiFID, BaFin and CFTC/NFA frameworks. CAIA charterholder, FINMA-registered insurance intermediary.
highlights: Runs LSFin/ARIF registered advisory firm specialised in French expatriates
Cross-border expertise: CH-EU, FR-IT, MiFID/FinSA suitability frameworks
Multi-jurisdiction regulatory background: FINMA, BaFin, CFTC/NFA
availability: Based in Lugano, fully mobile for Geneva

title: Senior COO, Credit Risk and Business Transformation
summary: 25+ years across banking, credit risk, governance and internal consulting, with deep COO experience in major Swiss private banking groups. Most recently served as COO for Credit Risk Management Wealth Management with a CHF 110bn credit exposure, leading a 20-FTE team and owning governance, controls, portfolio analytics, model governance and audit engagement. Led a global Credit Risk Policy function across four continents and directed policy integration during a major bank merger. Led a high-priority remediation taskforce for a discretionary mandate business under regulatory scrutiny, reviewing approximately 2,500 client portfolios and training over 3,000 front employees. Background includes Big 4 strategy consulting, Basel II implementation and global legal entity rationalisation programmes.
highlights: COO for Credit Risk Management Wealth Management, CHF 110bn exposure
Led FINMA-facing remediation taskforce, ~2,500 portfolios reviewed
Global Credit Risk Policy lead across four continents, post-merger integration
